name: coding-capybaras
description: Dark terminal theme for miniature-guacamole screen recordings. High contrast, no transparency.

notes.intended_use: Screen recordings for the Coding Capybaras YouTube channel (miniature-guacamole)

character_color_mapping.yellow: Product Owner (approximated from #8B4A2E — shifted to yellow for terminal readability)

notes.no_transparency: All colors are opaque hex values. Do not add transparency — it causes washed-out colors in screen recordings.
notes.font_recommendation: JetBrains Mono 16px or larger for recording readability
